headline: Marital rape exemption survives 4th reform attempt
context: Parliament rejected the fourth attempt to remove the marital rape exemption from Penal Code Section 375 in November 2024.

cards.big: Marital rape exemption in Section 375 Penal Code survives 4th reform bid
cards.sub: Malaysia remains among 36 countries that do not criminalise marital rape

cards.big: Penal Code Section 375 Exception explicitly excludes spousal intercourse from rape
cards.sub: Exception dates to colonial-era law and has never been amended

cards.big: CEDAW Committee recommended criminalisation of marital rape in 2018 review
cards.sub: International human rights standards recognise marital rape as a crime

cards.big: WAO found 53% of domestic violence survivors reported sexual violence by spouse
cards.sub: Cultural stigma prevents reporting even when physical violence is present

cards.big: An exception that permits sexual violence based on marriage status is state-endorsed harm
Joint Action Group for Gender Equality led parliamentary lobby with 89 MPs
